title: poa sphondylodes subsp. kelungensis
intro: Poa sphondylodes subsp. kelungensis, also known as Kelung fang tsai, is a subspecies of a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Poa sphondylodes subsp. kelungensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for various diseases such as hypertension and arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be dried and made into a tea or capsule for consumption.
